run_summary.summary: New inbound deal from Reach Agency — they're repping a spray paint brand under the Sherwin Williams umbrella and reached out to Liz on Friday afternoon (Apr 24). Liz responded within 2 hours confirming she's free from exclusivity and that the ~$10-12k budget aligns with her rate (she noted her estimate is slightly over $12k but she's flexible). The agency needed a response by EOD Monday 4/27 to pitch her profile to the brand client, so this is on track — now waiting to hear back from Coreyiel on next steps. Creating a deal card so it's on the board.

suggestions.message: Reach Agency's deadline to pitch Liz's profile to the brand client was EOD Monday 4/27. Liz already replied Friday night — so we're waiting on Coreyiel to come back with a formal offer. If you don't hear by Wednesday 4/29, worth a quick nudge to coreyiel.ellis@reach.agency.

deals.next_action: Wait for Coreyiel at Reach Agency to respond — agency pitching Liz's profile to brand client by 4/27
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Reach Agency (Coreyiel Ellis, Director Influencer Marketing, 504.919.3186) pitched a spray paint brand under the Sherwin Williams umbrella. Deliverables (subject to change): 1 TikTok video (syndicated to IG Reels + Pinterest), 1 IG Story Set (3 frames), 3 still assets for brand use. Budget ~$10-12k — Liz noted her estimate is slightly over $12k but she's flexible. Usage term: 5 months (Organic + Paid Social, Website, Retailer, Shopper, CRM/email). Exclusivity: 2 months in the spray paint category. Content launch: August 2026. Campaign also requires link in bio (14 days), IG Reels collab feature, TikTok Comment anchor, authentication rights (Sprout + TikTok), Comment CTA + pin, IG broadcast channel placement. Liz replied same evening confirming interest and that she's free from exclusivity.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: New inbound from Reach Agency — spray paint brand (Sherwin Williams umbrella) expressed interest. Liz replied same day confirming interest + rate alignment. Waiting for agency to pitch her profile to brand client (deadline 4/27) and come back with formal next steps.
